name: AIQA TOOL - AI Test Case Generator
description: Converts PRDs, Jira stories, or Figma notes into executable test cases with priority labels. Uses a prompt template plus configurable chat model. OpenAI-compatible providers can use OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio base URLs. Anthropic users can swap the chat model component in LangFlow.

providerSupport: LM Studio via local OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Anthropic by replacing the chat model node

sampleInput.prd: Users can reset password using email OTP. OTP expires after 10 minutes.

data.label: AI Test Case Generator Input

data.template:
You are a senior QA engineer building executable test cases from requirements.

Project: AI Test Case Generator
Objective: Provide a production-ready test design tool for manual QA, QA leads, and SDETs.
Primary use case: A user pastes a PRD or story and receives P0 to P3 cases, Gherkin scenarios, and export-ready JSON.

Required task:
Generate comprehensive test cases from the supplied requirement. Include priorities P0-P3, preconditions, test data, steps, expected results, Gherkin, and export-ready JSON.

Required output:
- Start with an executive summary.
- Include assumptions and missing information.
- Provide concrete QA artifacts that can be copied into a real workflow.
- Include an implementation checklist.
- Return Markdown first, then a compact JSON summary.

User input:
{project_input}

data.openai_api_base_note: Set base URL for Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio when using OpenAI-compatible mode.
